basic_details.job_title: UPSSSC – Block Organizer, Platoon Commander – 295 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Home Guards Headquarters, Uttar Pradesh, Lucknow
basic_details.short_information: UPSSSC Platoon Commander & Block Organizer Recruitment 2026 notification out for PET-2025 qualified candidates. Apply online from 16 June to 06 July 2026 for 295 permanent posts with salary up to ₹1,12,400. Selection through Main Written Exam + Physical Tests. Check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, syllabus & apply process.

application_fee.general_fee: General/OBC/EWS: ₹25 (Online Processing Fee only) | SC/ST: ₹25 (Online Processing Fee only)

age_limit.age_details: 21 to 40 years (relaxation applicable for reserved categories)

salary_details.pay_scale: Block Organizer: Level-5, ₹29,200-₹92,300 | Platoon Commander: Level-6, ₹35,400-₹1,12,400

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates for UPSSSC Block Organizer, Platoon Commander Recruitment 2026 must submit their application online through the official website upsssc.gov.in within the specified last date.
seo_tags: UPSSSC Platoon Commander Recruitment 2026 for 295 Posts - Apply Online Before 6 July
